posts.text:
This is truly a crazy whale!

Cinibengales created a new wallet on March 6, withdrew 1.5M $USDC from #Kraken, and started placing war-related bets on #Polymarket.

He made large bets on events like "Iran regime fall" and "US forces enter Iran", and is now down over $650K.

https://polymarket.com/0xa7d1ae08567d192db3c3cf1858c62c76dc8cb824
https://intel.arkm.com/explorer/address/0xBf79935Ba631585AE532A36581A98E750df56a5a

posts.text: A stocktake of the G20 club of big economies, which collectively accounts for 77% of global emissions, reveals wildly different trajectories for future emissions, as our charts show https://www.economist.com/graphic-detail/2025/11/04/for-the-first-time-climate-models-show-the-15c-goal-is-dead?taid=69c9f5555a6fb6000140e5e7&utm_campaign=editorial-social&utm_content=discovery.content&utm_medium=social-media.content.np&utm_source=twitter

posts.author: KobeissiLetter

posts.text:
Annual new PhDs: China leads decisively (~85,000 total, heavily STEM) vs. USA (~58,000 total, ~34,000 STEM).

Lab experiments per month: China performs ~2–4× more than the USA, driven by more R&D personnel, lower costs, and higher experimental output in publications/patents.

China dominates new supply and volume of lab work; Gap widening rapidly.

We all know where this is going…so we have a choice.  Invest in more lab experiments or lose the tech leadership completely.  

We need to wake up…
posts.author: BambroughKevin
